title: Regulated stablecoin FX and tokenized settlement is launching on Canton
message_html: Regulated stablecoin FX and tokenized settlement is launching on Canton ...
snippet: Canton Network (@CantonNetwork): Regulated stablecoin FX and tokenized settlement is launching on Canton. ClearToken is deploying CT Register, CT Pay, and CT Settle to deliver FCA-authorized tokenization, PvP payments, and DvP settlement across fiat, stablecoins, and crypto assets.

title: Kraken Owner Payward and Nasdaq Form Tokenization Pact
message_html: Kraken Owner Payward and Nasdaq Form Tokenization Pact ...
snippet: Kraken parent Payward launched a tokenization-focused partnership with Nasdaq, according to a Monday (March 9) news release. title: Sonic Labs taps Frax infrastructure for native network stablecoin
message_html: Sonic Labs taps Frax infrastructure for native network stablecoin ...
snippet: Sonic Labs' USSD stablecoin is backed by tokenized Treasuries products from BlackRock, WisdomTree, and Superstate.
